work.name: k-tools-module-creation
work.description: Create K_TOOLS module — command framework, help system, and operational utilities. Import legacy command registry, help scripts, and command routing into Knowledge 2.0 multi-module architecture.
tasks: Create module structure (conventions, documentation, methodology, scripts, work)
Import help_command.py and help_contextual.py from legacy
Adapt commands.md for new module paths
Wire help display to K_TOOLS scripts
Map each legacy command to target K_* module
